publishedAbstract: - Receiving frequent alert which says `prometheus-k8s-X is dropping X.X samples/s with different values but duplicated timestamp`.![Warning](https://access.redhat.com/sites/default/files/attachments/screenshot_2024-08-20_at_17.24.37.png)
publishedTitle: Receiving alert related to prometheus-k8s-X is dropping  samples/s with different values but duplicated timestamp in RHOCP4
